Wise debuts US listing on Nasdaq
Fintech Giant Wise Boosts Headcount And Marketing As It Prepares For Wall Street Listing
Wise's Planned Move to US Listing Draws Ire From Co-Founder

holdings.infoBox: WISE is an equity ETF with a total of 48 individual holdings. The top holdings are Advanced Micro Devices stock at 9.28%, QuickLogic at 7.95%, Gorilla Technology Group at 4.75%, Snowflake at 4.71%, and NVIDIA at 4.65%.

overview.description: The Themes Generative Artificial Intelligence ETF (WISE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund seeks to track a concentrated index of stocks from developed markets that derive their revenues from artificial intelligence related industries. Stocks are weighted based on their relevance to the investment theme WISE was launched on Dec 8, 2023 and is issued by Themes.
